description_pairs.source: Calendar is a flexible, user-friendly calendar component for React applications. It allows users to view, select, and manage dates with ease. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.
description_pairs.data: Calendar is a flexible, user-friendly calendar component for React applications. It allows users to view, select, and manage dates with ease. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.

description_pairs.source: No top-level component description in source; CalendarView is the internal rendering layer for Calendar and RangeCalendar, accepting a pre-built state object.
description_pairs.data: The size of the element. @default m
description_pairs.note: Data description is the size prop JSDoc, not a component description

description_pairs.source: DateField component is a versatile and convenient input field specifically designed for date entry in React applications. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.
description_pairs.data: DateField component is a versatile and convenient input field specifically designed for date entry in React applications. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.

description_pairs.source: DatePicker is a sophisticated, lightweight, and fully customizable component designed to provide intuitive date picking functionality in your React applications. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.
description_pairs.data: DatePicker is a sophisticated, lightweight, and fully customizable component designed to provide intuitive date picking functionality in your React applications. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.

description_pairs.source: RangeCalendar is a powerful, flexible, and user-friendly UI component designed for selecting a range of dates. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.
description_pairs.data: RangeCalendar is a powerful, flexible, and user-friendly UI component designed for selecting a range of dates. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.

description_pairs.source: No description in source file; component extends DateFieldProps with an added delimiter prop for range input.
No description in source file; component is typed as DatePickerProps<RangeValue<DateTime>>.
No description in source file; component renders a time-range ruler with draggable selection control.
RelativeDateField component is used only for entering relative dates using Grafana-like relative format (e.g. now-1d, now/w). It cannot be used as a normal DateField.
description_pairs.data: RelativeDateField component is used only for entering relative dates using Grafana-like relative format (e.g. now-1d, now/w). It cannot be used as a normal DateField.

description_pairs.source: RelativeDatePicker is almost the same component as DatePicker but it has ability to use relative dates. It can work in two modes: absolute and relative. You can switch it interactively by click on the f(x) button.
description_pairs.data: RelativeDatePicker is almost the same component as DatePicker but it has ability to use relative dates. It can work in two modes: absolute and relative. You can switch it interactively by click on the f(x) button.

description_pairs.source: No description in source file; component provides a relative/absolute range date picker with optional presets, timezone selector, and apply button.
